rules_text: Broken rules: Tic-Tac-Toe is played on a 3x3 grid. Two players take turns placing X and O. A player can place a mark anywhere. The first player to place three marks in a row wins. The game ends when the board is full.
gold_errors: does not specify which player uses x and which uses o
does not specify horizontal vertical or diagonal win conditions
does not mention draw if the board is full without a winner
